user_message: I need the team view on consumption trend. We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-21 14:20 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-14 08:07 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Northwind Traders

Just checking in on the consumption trend proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Northwind Traders
Date: 2024-02-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:08:00] Sandra Taylor (Northwind Traders): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around resource allocation.

[00:13:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:17:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is vendor dependencies.

[00:26:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.
